hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-$TOOL_INPUT_PATH}"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "SPEC.md"; then echo "SPEC MODIFIED. Run: python3 scripts/check_spec_quality.py $FILE"; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.py$" && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "src/"; then echo "CODE MODIFIED. Arabic text safe? Metadata preserved (D-023)?"; fi'

bash -c 'echo "POST-COMPACTION: Read NEXT.md for current task. Key rules: (1) Library IS the users knowledge — errors propagate silently. (2) Metadata never deleted (D-023). (3) Fail loud (D-033). (4) Multi-model consensus for content decisions. (5) Run Three Challenges before committing. (6) Invention before review."'
